metadata.title: Custom File Extensions Plugin
metadata.description: Associate views with custom file extensions via settings.

regex.target: text: "自定义文件扩展名设置"

regex.source: .setDesc("Valid entry is a JSON object who's property keys are view types and values are arrays of the file types to assign to that view.")
regex.target: .setDesc("有效条目是一个 JSON 对象，其属性键为视图类型，值为分配给该视图的文件类型的数组。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled: the config settings below will be used on mobile devices, and the above settings.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用：以下配置设置将在移动设备上使用，以及上述设置。")

regex.source: .setDesc("If enabled: the .md extension will be allowed to override the default markdown view type. This is disabled by default to prevent unexpected behavior.")
regex.target: .setDesc("如果启用：将允许 .md 扩展名覆盖默认的 Markdown 视图类型。此功能默认禁用，以防止意外行为。")
